settings.body: Toronto-designed seating and tables built for boardrooms, lounges, and hospitality environments. Keilhauer's craftsmanship sets the standard for Canadian commercial furniture.
Two of Canada's largest commercial furniture manufacturers — proven across government ministries, school boards, and corporate campuses province-wide.
Canadian-made ergonomic seating with a 12-year mechanism warranty. The preferred task chair for OECM-eligible buyers who need performance and durability.

settings.hero_subtitle: Design-led commercial furniture for Ontario institutions — OECM-eligible, delivered and installed across Canada.
settings.intro_text: Ontario's schools, hospitals, and municipalities need furniture that performs through 10-hour days and 10-year budgets. Brant Business Interiors carries 9 commercial product categories — from ergonomic task seating to acoustic quiet pods — all available without tender under OECM Agreement 2025-470. One supplier, one quote, one installation crew. Quote in 1 business day.
